com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.pinentry

Class ExtOfflinePINParameters

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.pinentry.ExtPINEntryParameters
      • com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.pinentry.ExtOfflinePINParameters

  • public class ExtOfflinePINParameters
extends ExtPINEntryParameters
    Parameters for offline PIN entry.

    • Constructor Detail

      • ExtOfflinePINParameters

        public ExtOfflinePINParameters()

    • Method Detail

      • isRandomProtectMode

        public boolean isRandomProtectMode()
        Whether to use random key or not.
        Returns:
        Random key flag.
        • 'true': Use random key derived by the specified KEK. Key index shall be KEK index which is used to derive random PIN key.
        • 'false': Use loaded PIN key. Key index shall be PIN key index.

      • setRandomProtectMode

        public void setRandomProtectMode(boolean randomProtectMode)
        Sets whether to use random key or not.
        Parameters:
        randomProtectMode - Random key flag.
        • 'true': Use random key derived by the specified KEK. Key index shall be KEK index which is used to derive random PIN key.
        • 'false': Use loaded PIN key. Key index shall be PIN key index.

      • getModulus

        public byte[] getModulus()

      • setModulus

        public void setModulus(byte[] modulus)

      • getExponent

        public byte[] getExponent()

      • setExponent
